items.title: INT-PORTFOLIO-001: Service Dependencies For Completed Order Use Cases
items.summary: This page defines what portfolio-service already owns internally for UC-002, UC-003, and UC-004, and what must be supplied by other services/components before the SRS flow is end-to-end complete.
items.search_text: int-portfolio-001 int-portfolio-001: service dependencies for completed order use cases this page defines what portfolio-service already owns internally for uc-002, uc-003, and uc-004, and what must be supplied by other services/components before the srs flow is end-to-end complete. document integrations portfolio order

items.title: MSG-004: Order Cancelled Event
items.summary: An outbound event published by the portfolio service immediately after a pending order is cancelled and its reserved assets are released, per FR-PORTFOLIO-04.
items.search_text: msg-004 msg-004: order cancelled event an outbound event published by the portfolio service immediately after a pending order is cancelled and its reserved assets are released, per fr-portfolio-04. document messaging-contracts order

items.title: MSG-003: Order Created Event
items.summary: An outbound event published by the portfolio service immediately after a new pending order is created and saved, per FR-PORTFOLIO-04.
items.search_text: msg-003 msg-003: order created event an outbound event published by the portfolio service immediately after a new pending order is created and saved, per fr-portfolio-04. document messaging-contracts order

items.title: MSG-002: Portfolio Transaction Event
items.summary: An outbound event published after each transaction so downstream consumers (e.g. ai-service) have fresh portfolio context, per FR-PORTFOLIO-10.
items.search_text: msg-002 msg-002: portfolio transaction event an outbound event published after each transaction so downstream consumers (e.g. ai-service) have fresh portfolio context, per fr-portfolio-10. document messaging-contracts portfolio
